scripts.db:migrate: docker exec tomato-auth-service npx prisma db push --accept-data-loss
scripts.services:start: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace=services/api-gateway" "npm run dev --workspace=services/auth-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/user-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/restaurant-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/catalog-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/cart-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/order-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/payment-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/delivery-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/notification-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/review-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/analytics-service"
